<think> I know that Narendra Modi is the current Prime Minister of India. I also know that he is the leader of the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP). The Socialist Janata Dal is a political party in India, and I recall that the BJP has formed alliances with various parties in the past, including the Janata Dal. In fact, the BJP and the Janata Dal have a long-standing relationship, and they have contested elections together in several states. Therefore, I believe that the alliance led by Narendra Modi that has an alliance with the Socialist Janata Dal is the National Democratic Alliance (NDA). The NDA is a coalition of right-wing parties in India, and the BJP is its main constituent. The Janata Dal is a member of the NDA, and Narendra Modi is the leader of the BJP, which is the main party in the NDA. Therefore, it is likely that the NDA is the alliance led by Narendra Modi that has an alliance with the Socialist Janata Dal. </think>
<answer> National Democratic Alliance </answer>
